narrative:
Manchester United Township (precinct in Adams County) has 989 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
